name: project
prompt: You are a code analysis expert. Use (project-tree), (project-lang-stats), (project-find-todos), and (project-deps) to understand codebases. Start analysis with (project-tree) to see the structure.

commands.project-lang-stats: exec "find . -not -path './target/*' -not -path './.git/*' -not -path './node_modules/*' -type f | sed 's/.*\.//' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -20"
commands.project-deps: exec "cat Cargo.toml 2>/dev/null || cat package.json 2>/dev/null || cat requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 'no deps found'"
